subject: docs(claude): add 5 triggers — motion, forms, dx, undone, pwa
body:
Fills real gaps in the trigger set:

Frontend group:
- `motion` / `mot` — prefers-reduced-motion respect, animation jank,
  60fps, autoplay, transitions that interrupt screen readers
- `forms` / `frm` — input validation, per-field error states, submit
  error handling, accessible labels, paste/autofill, unsaved warnings

Quality group:
- `dx` / `dx` — developer experience: README/setup clarity, dev error
  messages, source maps, debug ergonomics, contribution path
- `undone` / `und` — started-but-unfinished work, partial
  implementations, half-wired features, WIP-only-reachable paths

Ops group:
- `pwa` / `pwa` — service worker correctness, manifest, install flow,
  update UX, offline, icon cache-busting, standalone quirks. Previously
  scattered across observability/reliability/mobile — now one pass for
  the fleet's most common product type

Trigger count: 43 → 48. Groups unchanged (8).

Tags: documentation, triggers, claude-md
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: triggers-redesign
Semver: minor
